name: BoxRob
author: Poki
description: BoxRob is a puzzle platform game created by 7Spot Games. In this game, your objective is to load cargo onto a truck with your flexible forklift. In order to complete a level, you need to collect all the boxes and drop them into their appropriate slot. Some levels are easy and you are just driving around to collect the boxes, but as you proceed in the game the levels become harder. Perform special moves or follow sequences to solve the puzzle and complete the level. Don't forget to share BoxRob with your friends and compare your high scores! How to play: Move left/right - A/D Jump - W Pick up boxes - Tap or left mouse button click About the creator: BoxRob was created by 7Spot Games. Play their other puzzle games on Poki: Duo Survival , Duo Survival 2 , Duo Vikings , Duo Vikings 2 , Duo Vikings 3 , ZOOM-BE , ZOOM-BE 2 , ZOOM-BE 3 , Truck Loader , Truck Loader 4 , and Truck Loader 5
